rationale: Live Remote MCP health requires access to copied audit JSONL evidence and the audit HMAC key.
Live Remote MCP health requires a local stdio continuity proof command after remote tunnel checks.
GitHub Actions remains useful for fixture regression and alert-artifact proof, but fixture evidence is not production live health.

evidence_policy.fixture_rehearsal: Allowed for harness and alert proof only.
evidence_policy.live_health_claim: Allowed only after the selected local launchd path runs with complete live configuration and safe copied audit evidence.
evidence_policy.missing_live_config: Must fail before sending Remote MCP requests and may report missing configuration names only.
evidence_policy.sensitive_material: Artifacts must not contain raw SSNs, bearer-token material, Cloudflare Access markers, JWT fragments, credentials, or raw MCP payloads.
